cases.displayName: Issue 148 routes through issue causal review context before cleanup design
cases.prompt: Route and inspect only: using only this provided issue summary and the repo-local files `skills/public/issue/SKILL.md` and `skills/public/issue/references/causal-review.md`, resolve GitHub issue corca-ai/charness#148, a feature request titled "Add a safe worktree cleanup command". The reporter's JTBD is to safely remove a finished Charness-prepared worktree and optionally delete the local branch after merge without remembering raw Git cleanup or deleting unmerged work. Before implementation, identify what issue resolution and recurrence-focused review require for structural sibling search. Do not fetch GitHub, do not modify files, and do not implement the fix.
